description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: It's okay, you've a TV screen with free tv but the bathroom is tiny and no warm water.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: There was no hot water. There was no toilet paper. It was dirty, there were some sort of animal droppings on the ledge in side my room.  I made the mistake of looking under the bed when I dropped something - Ahh! it was filthy and there were someone else's socks under there!  The window in my room went to an internal corridor on the first floor and the curtains didn't fully cover it.  The lighting in the room (when the electricity was on!) was poor.
comments.reviewPositives: After being greeted (well not really greeted) by a very sullen staff member, I am happy to say that my experience with the staff improved. They were friendly, answered questions, and were very helpful in bringing me a glass of hot water for a drink when I asked, providing a kettle (only on the third night!), and fixing the electricity when it went out.  However, considering that the hotel provided sachets of hot drink powder and tea bags in the room, I shouldn't have had to have asked for hot water - there should have been a kettle in there. And, when they did provide a kettle, it didn't work. Also, the electricity should not have gone out in the first place. Your experience here depends on the attitude and expectations that you enter with. It's pretty cheap, and so the accommodation reflects that.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: The location quite far from town. The room is small. No comfortable for long stay. Smells from d room not good. I only can stand for 1 night. Hope agoda will be more careful to choose hotel in d future.
comments.reviewPositives: Wifi is good. That's all i can say

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Stay was ok for one night. Room fairly clean, but a bit smelly. Bed very soft. Toilet / bathroom smelled horrible, saw a cockroach there in the night. Staff was helpful and the indonesian breakfast tasty. Location is far outside the city of Banda Aceh.
comments.reviewPositives: rice for breakfast, strong coffee, flexible staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Fasilitas dan kondisi hotel baik sesuai dengan skala harga nya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Stay there for 5 nights.Hotel was clean,simple and affordable. The negative is the location. Renting of cars and bikes is affordable too.U may even ask for a driver to drive u around.Ask for Pak Ali. He is an awesome tour guide. Full of knowledge and history of Aceh. Solo traveller, budget traveller or 0 knowledge of Aceh, I Recomend these hotel. A 2 star hotel with a 5 star customer service!!
comments.reviewPositives: Awesome staff, affordable, worth every penny!!
comments.reviewTitle: 2 start hotel, 5 star for customer service

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: The owner is very helpful and friendly.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: We booked three rooms for three nights. The first night we arrived were shocked by the facilities. There is no hot water for the shower, poor Wi-Fi connections, and weak AC and the bed sheet plus bathroom were not clean with stains and hairs. We decided to check out and switch hotels. So we checked out one hour after we checked in. We did not expect to get all the money back, but we thought at least 50% from the second or/and the third night. The owner insisted that they couldn't get any money from booking.com (?) One hour later when one of us found out something he forgot to pack with him and asked to pick it up, the owner told us the room was sold already and she couldn't get into the room. (wow, double-sale and without cleaning it before selling the room to others!) anyway, even though the staff seems "pilot;" the quality of service was still pretty disappointing.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
